title: ElevenLabs Conversational AI Agent
description: Represents a conversational AI agent in the ElevenLabs platform, including its configuration for voice, language model, tools, and knowledge base.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the conversational AI agent.

metadata.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs associated with the agent.

tools.description: List of tools the agent can invoke during conversations.

knowledge_base.description: Knowledge base documents available to the agent for answering questions.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the agent was created.

ConversationConfig.description: Full configuration defining the agent's conversational behavior.

prompt.description: The system instructions that define agent behavior, personality, and conversation goals.

first_message.description: The initial greeting or message the agent sends when a conversation starts.

language.description: The primary language for the agent in ISO 639-1 format.

tts.description: Text-to-speech configuration for the agent's voice output.

voice_id.description: The voice identifier used for the agent's speech.

model_id.description: The TTS model used for speech synthesis.

voice_settings.description: Voice settings overrides for the agent.

stt.description: Speech-to-text configuration for processing user audio input.

model_id.description: The STT model used for transcription.

llm.description: Language model configuration for generating conversation responses.

temperature.description: Controls randomness in the model's responses. Lower values produce more deterministic output.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in the model's response.

turn_detection.description: Configuration for detecting when the user has finished speaking.

silence_duration_ms.description: Duration of silence in milliseconds before the system determines the user has finished speaking.

AgentTool.description: A tool that the agent can invoke during conversations to access external services or data.

description.description: Description of what the tool does, used by the LLM to determine when to invoke it.

webhook_url.description: The endpoint URL for webhook-type tools.

parameters.description: JSON Schema defining the parameters the tool accepts.

KnowledgeBaseDocument.description: A document in the agent's knowledge base used to provide context for answering questions.

document_id.description: Unique identifier for the knowledge base document.

type.description: The source type of the document.

source_url.description: URL source for the document, if type is url.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the document was added to the knowledge base.
